parameters.name: Subscription
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the Microsoft Azure subscription. The subscription ID forms part of the ID for every Azure resource.

parameters.name: Resource Type
parameters.description: Type of resource to create event subscription on.

parameters.name: Subscription Name
parameters.description: Name to use for the new Event Grid subscription.

parameters.name: Resource Name
parameters.description: Name of the resource to listen to for events.

parameters.name: Event Type
parameters.description: Type of event to listen for.

returns.raw:
| Name | Path | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Event data | data |  | Contains the data from the event. |
| Event Time | eventTime | date-time | Time of the event. |
| Event Type | eventType | string | Type of the event. |
| ID | id | string | ID for the event. |
| Subject | subject | string | Subject of the event. |
| Topic | topic | string | Resource that fired the event. |
